title: between without columns
poc: select id from t1 where 5 between 4 and 6;
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(id INT, value VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT id FROM t1 WHERE 5 BETWEEN 4 AND 6;
SELECT id FROM t1 WHERE value IS NULL OR value BETWEEN 'a' AND 'z';
